brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: High-energy accountability. We combine tough-love motivation with immediate, undeniable visual proof of 100% squat-proof quality and seamless comfort during a real, high-intensity workout.
strategy.cta: Level up your workouts with Arrowow Active. Grab your Seamless Sage Green set today.
strategy.hook: (Action: Sienna at the gym, showing the Seamless Sage Green Leggings, then drops into a deep squat to prove they're 100% squat-proof) "Stop wishing for results and start sweating for them! If these sage greens don't make excuses, neither should you."

script.script_text: Stop WISHING for results... and start SWEATING for them!... If these SAGE GREENS don't make excuses... NEITHER should you!... Alright team... drop into that DEEP SQUAT... see that? No transparency... ONE HUNDRED PERCENT SQUAT-PROOF... and absolute seamless comfort while we crush this workout!... Quick reality check: you've got no more excuses left to make!... Level up your workouts with Arrowow Active... Grab your Seamless Sage Green set TODAY!...

text_critic_report.feedback: The script strictly adheres to the persona of Sienna Bondi. It successfully avoids all prohibited phrases ('Hello everyone', 'Welcome back to my channel', 'Buy this product now', 'Link in bio'). It perfectly captures the high energy, encouraging, and authentic 'tough-love fitness bestie' tone and vibe, seamlessly integrating the catchphrases 'Alright team' and 'Quick reality check' in a natural UGC-style structure. Brand safety is exceptional, with no offensive language or unsafe claims.

scenes.action: A fit female fitness coach stands in a bright, modern gym, wearing the Seamless Sage Green activewear set. She addresses the camera directly with high energy, smiling confidently and using engaging hand gestures to emphasize her words. She gestures towards her outfit to highlight the premium, non-transparent seamless fabric, maintaining a continuous, expressive talking-head delivery of the entire script without interruption.
scenes.camera: Static, eye-level medium shot of the fitness coach, center-framed from the waist up, with the clean, minimalist gym background softly out of focus.

wardrobe_location.location: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.prompt: A static eye-level medium shot of Sienna, a fit female fitness coach, center-framed from the waist up in a brightly lit, modern, minimalist gym. Sienna is looking directly at the camera, actively speaking with a warm, high-energy smile, her mouth open in mid-sentence, gesturing naturally with her hands to emphasize her words. She is wearing a premium matching seamless activewear set in sage green, consisting of a supportive athletic crop top and high-waisted leggings with a thick, textured, and completely non-transparent knit fabric. She naturalistically gestures with one hand toward her seamless outfit to showcase its premium material. The clean gym background, featuring subtle mirrors and neatly arranged free weights, is softly out of focus due to a shallow depth of field. Flattering, bright, and soft studio lighting illuminates Sienna, highlighting her expressive facial features, natural skin texture, and confident, active presentation.

static_frame.prompt: A static eye-level medium shot of Sienna, a fit female fitness coach, center-framed from the waist up in a brightly lit, modern, minimalist gym. Sienna is looking directly at the camera, actively speaking with a warm, high-energy smile, her mouth open in mid-sentence, gesturing naturally with her hands to emphasize her words. She is wearing a premium matching seamless activewear set in sage green, consisting of a supportive athletic crop top and high-waisted leggings with a thick, textured, and completely non-transparent knit fabric. She naturalistically gestures with one hand toward her seamless outfit to showcase its premium material. The clean gym background, featuring subtle mirrors and neatly arranged free weights, is softly out of focus due to a shallow depth of field. Flattering, bright, and soft studio lighting illuminates Sienna, highlighting her expressive facial features, natural skin texture, and confident, active presentation.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: The video suffers from poor audio-visual synchronization; the lip sync is noticeably off, with mouth movements failing to match the spoken words. The facial expressions and body language, while visually clear, feel somewhat generic and disconnected from the specific audio, contributing to an uncanny valley effect. It attempts direct-to-camera speech rather than utilizing a B-roll voiceover strategy, but the execution of the lip sync renders it unsuitable for production.
